title: OKR Design Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the OKR Design skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

documented_organizational_mission.description: Documented organizational mission and strategy (including strategic priorities for the planning period)

current_performance_data.description: Current performance data establishing the baseline for each key result candidate

resource_capacity_constraints.description: Resource and capacity constraints at company and team level

list_strategic_initiatives.description: List of strategic initiatives already committed or under consideration

prior_okr_cycle.description: Prior OKR cycle results and scoring data

employee_team.description: Employee or team-level goal inputs from bottom-up contribution process
